mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_team_member (member_id, team_id, activity_id, product_id, user_id, order_id, pay_price, is_leader, address, contact_name, contact_phone, status, join_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{teamId}, #{activityId}, #{productId}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{payPrice}, #{isLeader}, #{address}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_team_member SET order_id = #{orderId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
UPDATE group_buy_team_member SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
